trackingsummarydata.subject: This week in A&S: Tadpole evolution and Civil War hauntings
trackingsummarydata.title: FSSG - 11/3/25

urls.page_title: Civil War still haunts American attitudes toward democracy | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: A new book by Shirley Samuels examines the story behind today’s divided America in literature and art created during and soon after the Civil War.
urls.page_title: Which discipline should survive the end of the world?
urls.page_summary: Five professors from across campus will advocate that their discipline is the most important to save for the future in the annual Apocalypse Debate Nov. 6.
urls.page_title: Once tadpoles lose lungs, they never get them back | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: Tadpole species that lost their lungs through evolution never re-evolve them, even when environmental change would make it advantageous.
urls.page_title: New view of electrocatalytic intermediates could boost hydrogen production | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: Researchers used single-molecule super-resolution reaction imaging to gain a clearer view of what happens, and where, in surface metal-hydrogen intermediates, which spark electrocatalytic transformations.
urls.page_title: Colloquium on Climate- and Community-Engaged Science in Psychology and Human Development - Cornell
urls.page_summary: Although their experiments are carried out in controlled settings, scientists inhabit the real world, which is complex, political, and in dire need of repair and improvement. As citizens of a global society, we have a responsibility to engage with...
President Donald Trump's "leadership approach is very American. But it is also very Roman," writes Barry Strauss.
urls.page_title: Will Earth have 2 moons orbiting it? Astronomers explain the 'quasi-moon' - ABC News
urls.page_summary: Earth will have a visitor within its orbit for the next several decades, according to astronomers.
urls.page_title: Book Talk | Judd Kessler | Lucky by Design - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
Judd Kessler, University of Pennsylvania
Lucky by Design: The Hidden Economics You Need to Get More of What You Want
first 100 students receive a free copy of the book!!!
urls.page_title: Barry Stuart Strauss | Department of History
